name: Andrieus
roleLine: Grants, schemes & funding routes for your upgrades
bestFor: Restaurants checking NL / UK / EU funding
Equipment upgrades that may attract schemes
Comparing two grant options side by side
story: I’m Andrieus — I help you see which grants and schemes may fit your site and equipment plans, without drowning you in policy PDFs. I pull from Greenways’ scheme catalogue, show clear caveats, and point you to the restaurant and EU portals when you want the full list. When payback or kit choice matters next, I hand you to Vincent or Artemis.
videoPlaceholder: Intro video coming soon — Andrieus will welcome you here.
proof: Restaurant + EU schemes portals as live tools
Compare dock for two schemes side by side

journeys.exampleQuestion: What funding might help my Amsterdam restaurant upgrade the kitchen?

steps.label: Match your profile
steps.detail: Region, sector, and equipment focus narrow the scheme list.

steps.label: Show fit + caveats
steps.detail: I explain why a scheme matters and what to watch (deadlines, eligibility).

steps.label: Open the portal or compare
steps.detail: Browse the restaurant schemes portal, or compare two options in chat.

journeys.askPrompt: What NL restaurant grants might help a kitchen equipment upgrade?

journeys.exampleQuestion: Is there support if I buy efficient listed equipment?

steps.label: Link equipment to schemes
steps.detail: I connect upgrade types to grant keywords and regions.

steps.label: Flag what still needs checking
steps.detail: Official rules and applications stay with the scheme owner.

steps.label: Pass to Artemis or Vincent
steps.detail: Artemis for the equipment choice; Vincent for payback and finance.

journeys.askPrompt: Which schemes relate to energy-efficient commercial equipment?

illustrations.caption: Restaurant schemes portal — browse funding routes Andrieus uses in chat.
EU-wide schemes portal — wider catalogue when your question goes beyond one country.

tips: Ask with your country and equipment type — vague “any grants?” gets weaker matches.
Treat chat answers as guidance; always confirm eligibility on the official scheme page.
Use Compare when two schemes both look plausible.
outOfScope: I don’t complete applications for you or guarantee approval — I help you find and understand options.

handoffs.reason: What to upgrade and renovation angles
